falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any daily close within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows (~4970) would invalidate the bottom pattern match, as the prior bottom held that level; this would confirm continuation lower, not a bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28-30; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation beyond the reference pattern, breaking the similarity and suggesting a more severe liquidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield falls below 3.80% while SPX is below 5200
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: In August 2024, yields and equities fell together briefly then diverged (yields down, equities up); if yields collapse with equities still weak, it signals recession fear rather than soft-landing bottom, invalidating the cyclical bottom thesis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
